name: Aromatic Broth with Vegetable Slivers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the lemon grass into 2-inch pieces and bruise lightly. Combine with stock, cilantro stems, chili, and lime zest in a saucepan. Simmer, covered for 15 minutes (taste and remove hot pepper halfway through if desired).
2. Strain the broth. Re-use solids with more cilantro to flavor another batch. Add lime juice, salt, and pepper.
3. Cut snow peas into thin diagonal strips. Shave carrot ribbons using a vegetable peeler. Thinly slice radishes and scallion.
4. Bring soup to a boil, stirring in snow peas and carrots until just tender (about 1 1/2 minutes). Stir in radishes, scallion, and cilantro; bring to a boil. Serve immediately.
